particulars.description: By way of legal mortgage the property k/a unit 4 septimus hawkfield business park whitchurch bristol. By way of fixed charge the benefit of all covenants and rights concerning the property and plant machinery fixtures fittings furniture equipment implements and utensils the goodwill of any business carried on at the property and the proceeds of any insurance affecting the property or assets.

secured_details.description: All monies due or to become due from the company to the chargee on any account whatsoever

particulars.description: (Including trade fixtures). Fixed and floating charges over the undertaking and all property and assets present and future including goodwill bookdebts uncalled capital buildings fixtures fixed plant and machinery.
